SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-01-2024 - JUDGMENT.
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $12,500.00 FILED BY MARQUEZ-MARES, ARTURO AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, DIEGO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-01-2024 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, DIEGO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-01-2024 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-01-2024 BY JUDGE PRO TEM. PLAINTIFF ARTURO MARQUEZ-MARES IS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER MONICA HERNANDEZ. DEFENDANT DIEGO CRUZ IS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARQUEZ-MARES, ARTURO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, DIEGO $1,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
